suggestions.title: Model systematically under-predicts total goals
suggestions.detail: Expected avg 2.51 goals/match vs actual 2.86 (calibration factor 1.14x). WC 2018 avg was 2.64, WC 2022 was 2.69. Group stage WC 2026 is running hotter — consider raising DC attack priors or adding a WC-specific inflation parameter.

suggestions.title: O/U 2.5 fair prices are over-priced
suggestions.detail: Model predicted 45.4% of matches go Over 2.5 goals, actual rate is 57.1% (delta +11.7%). Recalibrate by applying the goals calibration factor to lambda before pricing O/U markets, or use an empirical WC-specific baseline rate.

suggestions.title: Model performing worse than market consensus on 1X2
suggestions.detail: Brier Skill Score vs market = -0.011 (negative = worse than market). DC alone BSS = -0.043. The blend may need rebalancing. Review blend weights (currently 0.10 Elo + 0.30 DC + 0.60 Market) — increasing market weight or adding a Platt scaling pass on DC probabilities could improve calibration.

suggestions.title: Large goal-total errors suggest model underestimates match variance
suggestions.detail: 6 matches had total-goals error ≥ 2.5 goals. Worst: Algeria vs Austria (expected 2.4, actual 6). A Negative Binomial goal model (with dispersion parameter fit on WC18+22) would better capture the fat tail. Also consider adding a 'blowout' prior for large team-strength mismatches (λ ratio > 3x).

statsbomb_context.source: StatsBomb Open Data (WC2018 season 3, WC2022 season 106)
statsbomb_context.note: Model corner/card priors are calibrated on WC18+22 StatsBomb data. WC2026 actuals are being tracked here in real-time to detect drift.
